ticket.subject: Same query 8x slower after Postgres 15 → 16 upgrade
ticket.body: We upgraded from Postgres 15 to 16 last week. A specific query (filtered scan on a 50M-row table with a multi-column GIN index) now takes 4.2s p95 vs 0.5s on 15. EXPLAIN ANALYZE shows the planner picked a different index. Is there a known regression around GIN cost estimation in 16, or is this a stats-refresh issue?
